comment: v0.9.4 slice A3b deploy config for examples-dev/airlock.termin. Pairs the `airlock` namespace presentation contracts to the termin-airlock-provider; binds the two ai-agent computes (aria + evaluator) to the stub provider for plumbing-verification mode. Switch the compute bindings to `anthropic` with the api_key env-var interpolation (see comment after bindings block) for the live-walkthrough mode. Requires the termin-airlock-provider package (pip install -e ../termin-airlock-provider) and a built bundle at src/termin_airlock_provider/static/bundle.js.
